method: Agent read assembled book.txt directly. Full reads: micro_book_15 burnout + micro_book_15 anxiety. Targeted section reads + gate-report cross-check on the remaining 11 assembled cells. No paid LLM, no GPU, no llm_callback.

shared_findings.core_prose_quality: Paragraph-level prose is genuinely strong: vivid corporate-manager opening scenes, clinically accurate burnout/anxiety framing, warm contemplative voice, real therapeutic value. This is bestseller-adjacent at the paragraph level.
shared_findings.cohesion_defect: Between paragraphs, short single-sentence interstitial atoms (scene-anchor / bridge / dwell-beat) are inserted that do NOT connect to the surrounding prose and read as a stream of disconnected fortune-cookie fragments (e.g. 'The story can wait while the body catches up.', 'Quiet the explanation. Watch the small switch flip.', 'The seeing has a downstairs. Step into it.'). Near-identical fragments recur across chapters AND across topics (burnout vs anxiety), which a reader notices as repetition. This is the dominant cohesion/therapeutic-flow weakness and it is topic-agnostic.
shared_findings.micro_format_truncation: micro_book_15 specifically ends mid-sentence ('Breathing through the' / 'It') because the runtime word-ceiling clamp trims the final chapter tail. Larger formats end cleanly.
shared_findings.register_vs_human_gap: Several cells PASS register_gate yet a human reader sees real cohesion problems (disconnected bridge atoms). register PASS is necessary but NOT sufficient for reader-felt cohesion — a proxy-validity caveat in its own right.

per_book.cohesion: WEAK — strong paragraphs, but dense disconnected bridge fragments + mid-sentence truncation at the end
per_book.therapeutic_value: HIGH at paragraph level (accurate burnout signature, somatic practices, anti-catastrophizing)

per_book.cohesion: WEAK — same disconnected-bridge pattern as burnout; core prose excellent ('coming home to the person you already are')
per_book.therapeutic_value: HIGH (homecoming framing, present-self acceptance, somatic regulation)
bestseller_red_flags: same fragment atoms reused from burnout book

per_book.cohesion: WEAK — same pattern, slightly more room to breathe
MODERATE — longer chapters dilute the fragment density
MODERATE — clean ending, more developed chapters, fragments still present
WEAK — register F2 HARD_FAIL (1) flags a register/scene-anchor breach a reader would feel as a tonal/closing-line repeat
MODERATE — 52k words, register WARN; fragments dilute but recurrence is visible over 12 long chapters
bestseller_red_flags: fragment repetition across a very long book

per_book.cohesion: N/A — BUILD_FAIL: scene_anchor density cap (>3-word phrase repeats exceed cap 3) halted render before book.txt
bestseller_red_flags: scene_anchor density hard-fail blocks the deepest burnout build

headline: Paragraph prose is therapeutically strong and bestseller-adjacent; the assembled-book weakness is COHESION between atoms (disconnected, repeated bridge/scene-anchor fragments), not therapeutic substance. A book can PASS register_gate and still read as cohesion-weak to a human — so plan-cohesion + register PASS together still UNDER-predict reader-felt cohesion.
